name: Texas Round Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 lb 2 oz round beef, about half an inch thick (weighed after fat and bone are removed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the flour, salt, and chile powder together in a bowl.
2. Dredge the meat in the flour mixture; use about half of it (discard the rest).
3. Heat oil in a heavy frying pan over moderate heat.
4. Brown the meat on both sides.
5. Transfer steaks to a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
6. Fry peppers and onions in the same pan, stirring frequently.
7. Remove vegetables with a slotted spoon and spread over the meat.
8. Pour out any remaining fat.
9. Add beef broth to the pan and cook until it absorbs and browns the particles.
10. Add the remaining ingredients to the broth; mix well.
11. Pour the mixture over the meat and lightly stir.
12. Cover tightly and bake at 325°F for about 1-1 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
13. Serve one piece of steak with some sauce per serving.
Food Exchange: 1 FRUIT EXCHANGE + 3 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 213
Protein: 20g
Carbohydrates: 9g
Fat: 11g
For low-sodium diets, omit salt and use low-sodium broth, tomato sauce, and tomato juice.
